string.text: Find the %s rare Artefact for Beard
Beard wants you to find the %s artefact for him.
I have a list of clients who pay good money for rare artifacts. Do you want to try to get one for me?

%c[ui_8]I have a list of clients who pay good money for rare artifacts... Right now, there's an order for the %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8] artifact. If you bring it to me, I'll pay well. But hurry up, stalker, you might not be the only one hunting for it...
Good hunting stalker! Have a drink on the house!
Kill Military for Owl
Convince the military to call off his search for a fellow stalker.

%c[ui_8]There's one person the military is after. Don't ask why, but we need to help the poor guy. I found out who's in charge of the search, and I need a specialist in tough negotiations - someone who can "convince" the hunter to leave the man alone. Well, you get it...
Well, you killed him. That's the job done.
Hunt Mutants for Gonta
Gonta asked me to clear the area of mutants and report back after the job is done.

%c[ui_8]I'm hunting mutants in this area, but there are still a lot of them around, and I'm having trouble keeping up. I wouldn't mind the help of an experienced hunter. If you're ready to help, I'll send the lair coordinates to your PDA. Once you've cleared out the beasts, come back for your reward.\n\n%c[ui_orange][This task will fail if after taking it, the player goes to a location where this task is not available]
Haha! Well done stalker!
Collect %s for Gonta
Gonta says he will pay well if I can bring him a %s.
I have a bounty out on a particular type of mutant. Are you interested?
%c[ui_8]I pay extra for eliminating dangerous mutants. But I need the proof of the creature's death. A %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8] will confirm the kill. Are you up for the job?.
Ah, another threat eliminated and a new decoration for the camp. Well done, stalker.
Find %s for Cardan
%s are required by Cardan to install basic equipment upgrades, you should bring them back to him if you find any.
Not only do I need some more booze I can really use a good set of tools, stalker. If you are interested in helping me out, I will tell you what I need.
%c[ui_8]I need a set of %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8]. It should contain what I need. If you can bring some back for me I will be grateful, I will even offer you a discount from here on out.
Great, stalker. You brought exactly what I've asked. Thanks.
Find %s for Cardan
%s are required by Cardan to install advanced equipment upgrades, you should bring them back to him if you find any.
I could really use more tools and vodka. But the vodka is easy to find. What I need from you is more tools; better tools. Can you do this for me?
%c[ui_8]I need a set of %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8]. It should contain what I need. If you can bring some back for me I will be grateful, I will even offer you a discount from here on out.
Fantastic! Feel free to stop by any time for a drink or if you need me to take a look at your gear.
Find %s for Cardan
%s are required by Cardan to install expert equipment upgrades, you should bring them back to him if you find any.
I could really use more tools and vodka. But the vodka is easy to find. What I need from you is more tools; better tools. Can you do this for me?
%c[ui_8]I need a set of %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8]. It should contain what I need. If you can bring some back for me I will be grateful, I will even offer you a discount from here on out.
Fantastic! Feel free to stop by any time for a drink or if you need me to take a look at your gear.
Find detectors for Cardan
%s - required by Cardan, you should find some and bring them back to him.
Я разбираю старую электронику на запчасти. Плачу, в том числе, и за старые детекторы. Соберёшь пару таких тащи мне.

%c[ui_8]I take apart old electronics for spare parts. I pay for old detectors as well. If you find some, bring them here. Right now I need a couple of %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8]. If you bring it, I'll make it worth your while.
Great! Here you go, just like I promised.
Bring Alcohol for Axel
%s get it and bring it to Axel, so he can use it for wound disinfection.
I need more alcohol for wound disinfection. I will pay you if you bring me some.
%c[ui_8]I need more alcohol for wound disinfection. I will pay you well if you bring me some. %c[ui_orange]%s%c[default] would be ideal.
Perfect, exactly what I needed. Thank you!
